tmux_session: none (hexa_stage0 subprocess, tmux not installed on mac host)
steps_reduction_reason: hexa_stage0 interpreter OOM (~6.7GB RSS kill) past ~250 steps with the STEP_MS list + model state accumulation. 100 steps fully exercises the first-10-latencies deliverable and the loss-convergence stability invariant (loss reaches ln(8)=2.079 floor by step 80). P5a native interpreter rebuild will restore 500+ target.
speedup_interpretation: Real end-to-end train_step median is 1000ms on hexa_stage0 (forward + backward + optimizer dominates). Historical baseline was 27500ms/step because the 110 phi engines ran inline every step. Post-Track-B the phi block is ~43ms (bench_phi_cache_speedup.hexa isolated measurement) and the step budget is dominated by matmul, so realized training-loop speedup is (historical_phi_ms + base_step_ms) / base_step_ms ~= 27500/1000 = 27.5x. The isolated cache-block speedup is still 598x-630x as reported by bench_phi_cache_speedup.hexa; the difference is that real training is not only phi eval.
stability_verdict: PASS - 100 steps, no NaN/Inf, loss 3.47->2.10 converges to ln(8)=2.079 floor
